Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}It came out very well! I cannot see a single thread out of place![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}Oogh... You always know the right things to say, {f 4 2}-dono.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}When my uncle sees this, he will surely change his mind about Nihon![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It is time for him to concede![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I must hurry and go see him! Tout suite![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Alors... I have to say goodbye for a little while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I will not give in to my uncle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I made it out of the leftover material from the kimono.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It is a symbol of our friendship![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Please wait for me, {f 4 2}-dono. I am certain I will return.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Here in Nihon, the times I feel truly at home...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}They are the times I spend with you, my tomodachi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe seems to really care about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Temperance Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Yurlungur{f 0 1 27}, the governor of the heavens![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I promised Bebe I'd see him again,[n]then I went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
